'''Detta Rotan''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cell leader, based in [[Jalor City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gotida]].<ref name="AIR" />

In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Rotan's cell was discovered and attacked by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. During the crossfire, [[Riic Mardec]]'s [[Lina Mardec|wife]] and [[Sale Mardec|two]] [[Fora Mardec|daughters]] were killed. Mardec, an innocent cab driver, was devastated by the happening, and blamed the Rebel Alliance for it. Rotan wrote a report about this for the [[Task Force on Alliance Security]]. Although the deaths could have been due to Rebel or Imperial fire, Rotan nevertheless suggested a formal apology to Mardec in the name of the Alliance, and even helping him as much as possible.<ref name="AIR" />
